diagnostics.message: Booster Compressor outlet pressure target is too close to suction pressure for the required compression duty.
Booster Compressor minimum flow bypass percent is below the current anti-surge review threshold.
Booster Compressor efficiency_percent=104 is outside the recommended operating range.

payload.system:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

content.text: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-compressor-parameter-update-ordering-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","locale":"zh-CN","status":"complete","requires_confirmation":true,"answers":[{"summary":"针对当前选中的 Booster Compressor (compressor-2)，基于 3 条诊断（2 error + 1 warning）生成 3 条候选编辑提案：① 提高出口压力目标以满足压缩比要求；② 提高最小旁通流量百分比以满足防喘振审查阈值；③ 将效率修正至合理范围内。所有提案均需人工确认后方可应用。","issues":[{"code":"COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE","description":"Booster Compressor 出口压力目标 270 kPa 与吸入压力 260 kPa 仅差 10 kPa（压缩比 ≈1.04），不足以完成所需压缩功。","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-unit-1","flowdoc-stream-1"]},{"code":"COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW","description":"Booster Compressor 最小旁通流量百分比为 2%，低于当前防喘振审查阈值，存在喘振风险。","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-1"]},{"code":"UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE","description":"Booster Compressor efficiency_percent=104 超出物理合理范围（通常 ≤100%），导致求解器判定参数无效。","citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"提高出口压力目标至合理压缩比","target":{"type":"unit","id":"compressor-2"},"rationale":"当前出口压力目标 270 kPa 与吸入压力 260 kPa 仅差 10 kPa，压缩比约 1.04，远低于典型增压压缩机的最低有效压缩比。建议将出口压力目标提高至 520 kPa（压缩比 ≈2.0），以满足增压压缩工况需求。具体数值需用户根据下游工艺要求确认。","patch":{"parameter_updates":[{"path":"units[compressor-2].config.outlet_pressure_target_kpa","old_value":270,"new_value":520,"note":"占位值，压缩比≈2.0；用户应根据下游实际需求调整"}]},"risk_level":"high","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-1","flowdoc-unit-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"提高最小旁通流量百分比以满足防喘振要求","target":{"type":"unit","id":"compressor-2"},"rationale":"当前最小旁通流量百分比为 2%，低于防喘振审查阈值。建议提高至 10% 作为保守占位值，具体阈值应参照压缩机性能曲线与防喘振控制策略确认。","patch":{"parameter_updates":[{"path":"units[compressor-2].config.minimum_flow_bypass_percent","old_value":2,"new_value":10,"note":"占位值；用户应根据防喘振控制策略与性能曲线确认"}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"将压缩机效率修正至物理合理范围","target":{"type":"unit","id":"compressor-2"},"rationale":"efficiency_percent=104 超过 100%，在物理上不可能且导致求解器报 invalid_parameters。建议修正为 82%（典型离心压缩机等熵效率），用户可根据实际设备数据调整。","patch":{"parameter_updates":[{"path":"units[compressor-2].config.efficiency_percent","old_value":104,"new_value":82,"note":"占位值，典型离心压缩机等熵效率；用户应根据厂商数据确认"}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]}],"confidence":0.82,"citations":[{"id":"diag-1","label":"诊断：COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE","source":"diagnostics[0]"},{"id":"diag-2","label":"诊断：COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW","source":"diagnostics[1]"},{"id":"diag-3","label":"诊断：UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE","source":"diagnostics[2]"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-1","label":"流股：Compressor Suction (feed-9)","source":"flowsheet_document.streams[0]"},{"id":"flowdoc-unit-1","label":"单元：Booster Compressor (compressor-2)","source":"flowsheet_document.units[0]"},{"id":"snapshot-1","label":"求解快照：solver_status=invalid_parameters","source":"context.latest_snapshot"}]}]}

answers.text: 针对当前选中的 Booster Compressor (compressor-2)，基于 3 条诊断（2 error + 1 warning）生成 3 条候选编辑提案：① 提高出口压力目标以满足压缩比要求；② 提高最小旁通流量百分比以满足防喘振审查阈值；③ 将效率修正至合理范围内。所有提案均需人工确认后方可应用。

proposed_actions.title: 提高出口压力目标至合理压缩比
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前出口压力目标 270 kPa 与吸入压力 260 kPa 仅差 10 kPa，压缩比约 1.04，远低于典型增压压缩机的最低有效压缩比。建议将出口压力目标提高至 520 kPa（压缩比 ≈2.0），以满足增压压缩工况需求。具体数值需用户根据下游工艺要求确认。

response.summary: 针对当前选中的 Booster Compressor (compressor-2)，基于 3 条诊断（2 error + 1 warning）生成 3 条候选编辑提案：① 提高出口压力目标以满足压缩比要求；② 提高最小旁通流量百分比以满足防喘振审查阈值；③ 将效率修正至合理范围内。所有提案均需人工确认后方可应用。
